SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 02

JUDGE CHOPPELAS, M. BRADY, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK 3:01 PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. JACK FENDELL FOR PLTF, DEFT IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED, ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFT FOR RESTITUTION OF THE SUBJECT PREMISES, WRIT MAY ISSUE BUT EXECUTION STAYED UNTIL 11/7/94. PLTF. WAIVES ALL RENTS, BUT KEEPS SECURITY DEPOSIT. IF DEFT MOVES OUT BEFORE NOON OF 11/8/94, LEAVES PLACE IN CLEAN CONDITION, PLTF, WILL VACATE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS CASE W/ PREJUDICE. PLTF. WILL PREPARE JUDGMENT, DEFT TO GO TO PLTF'S OFFICE ON FRIDAY TO SIGN PAPERS. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TIMIN, VLADIMIR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1062 SUTTER STREET, #3 SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL NOV-07-1994, LEASE FORFEITED
